narrative:
Westerville 5-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 736 registered voters, with 46.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.9 percentage points.
